speech:
🤖 **AI Career Guidance Bot — Help Menu**

I can help you with:

1️⃣ **Career Roadmap** — Step-by-step learning path
2️⃣ **Required Skills** — Technical & soft skills
3️⃣ **Job Roles** — Titles you can target
4️⃣ **Salary Info** — India + Global ranges
5️⃣ **AI Risk Analysis** — Future-proofing your career
6️⃣ **Top Certifications** — Best certs to earn
7️⃣ **Interview Tips** — Crack your next interview
8️⃣ **Free Resources** — Best learning platforms
9️⃣ **Work Pressure** — Stress levels explained
🔟 **Growth Path** — Long-term progression

Just ask anything! 😊
